title: NASA's New Space Chip Is 500 Times More Powerful Than Any Before
script: The computers guiding spacecraft today were designed in the 1990s. NASA just changed that. Its new High Performance Spaceflight Computing chip — built by Microchip Technology — is 500 times more powerful than current space computers, fits in your palm, and survives deep space radiation. It passed testing at JPL last month. Future rovers, lunar habitats, and deep space probes will run it. For the first time, spacecraft will be able to think for themselves.
